_comment: Declarative workflow definition for presentation-builder. Designs classroom slide decks by anchoring to a standard, writing clear objectives, checking reading level, differentiating for the grade band, and gating quality.
description: Instructional slide deck: standards anchor → objectives → reading-level check → differentiation → quality gate

steps.note: Anchor the deck to one verified FL B.E.S.T. or NGSSS standard
Write 1-3 slide-level SWBAT objectives to structure the deck's gradual-release arc
Check that body text is at the appropriate grade-band reading level (one idea per slide)
Add UDL annotations: alt text, simplified language, vocabulary support, high-contrast notes

note: Render the final .pptx via scripts/build_deck.py (shared/office/). If python-pptx is absent, write the slide spec and report an honest gap.
